title: Charlotte Hornets Aim to Generate Buzz Under New Owners
description: Shelly Cayette-Weston, President of Business Operations for the Charlotte Hornets, discusses the team’s strategic initiatives to enhance the fan experience and drive economic development in Charlotte. She speaks with Romaine Bostick and Bailey Lipschultz on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)
